name: VEEA INC.
business: Veea Inc. provides a hybrid edge-cloud computing and communications platform (VeeaONE) that brings applications and AI to the network edge, including VeeaHub all-in-one devices with computing, storage, networking, and IoT capabilities. The platform is sold to service providers, system integrators, and distributors for use in broadband access, smart buildings, agriculture, retail, and other enterprise applications. The company also offers subscription-based services such as SecureConnect and AirLynx for managed Wi-Fi and edge applications.
sellsTo: enterprises in smart buildings, agriculture, retail, warehousing, construction, healthcare, and defense

exposures.sentence: enables machine learning with AI training, inferencing, and Agentic AI at the Edge ( Edge AI ) including AI-driven cybersecurity for heterogenous networks.
with any combination of CPUs, GPUs, TPUs, DPUs and/or NPUs, that run on the VeeaONE platform s software stack VeeaWare.

advanced AI-driven cybersecurity, through mobile network operators ( MNOs ) , multiple system operators ( MSOs ), Internet Service Providers ( ISPs ), Managed Service Providers ( MSPs ), system integrators and major distributors.
spawns hyperconvergence of computing, multiaccess communications and storage, ( Edge Computing ) c) provides for Cloud-managed applications at the Edge ( Hybrid Edge-Cloud Computing ).
an IoT gateway, NVMe data storage and 4G/5G modules referred to as the VeeaHub product.
smart farming with precision agriculture, smart warehouses and smart retail as cloud-managed converged private networks.
Defense & Public Safety unmanned systems, intelligent surveillance, predictive maintenance, AI-driven IoT.
Construction construction safety, automated job and resource tracking, behavioral sensing, fire, gas and water leak detection, digital twin.

Healthcare (home, nursing homes, clinics and hospitals) HIPPA compliant remote patient monitoring, intelligent medical devices, asset and resource management at hospitals, environmental monitoring and controls, behavioral sensing.

Energy and In-Building Climate Management energy grid monitoring, building management and automation, lighting controls, predictive maintenance, waste management based on containerized Niagara BMS or other integrated applications.
AI inferencing (e.g., CCTVs with computer vision application at retail locations and construction sites).
Transportation supply chain and asset management, operator safety, real-world data-collection with cameras and sensors, refrigeration monitoring and controls, predictive maintenance.
Smart Manufacturing anomaly detection, worker safety, environmental controls, predictive maintenance.
Smart Warehouses and Smart Retail that we believe offer high potential for growth.

catalysts.event: Full commercial launch of SecureConnect by Telcel
catalysts.sentence: Telcel announced its full commercial Telcel of SecureConnect to its customers in April 2026.

catalysts.event: StarGroup roll out of AirLynx networks in over 100 villages
catalysts.sentence: Through our partnership with StarGroup, we expect that StarGroup will work to roll out AirLynx networks in over hundred villages and small towns over the next 12 months.

tamClaims.claim: Edge AI market size $20.8B in 2024, expected $24.9B in 2025, $66.5B by 2030 (21.7% CAGR)
tamClaims.sentence: Edge AI market size in 2024 was on the order of US$20.8 billion, and is expected to reach US$24.9 billion in 2025, and US$66.5 billion by 2030, with a 21.7% CAGR (2025 2030).

tamClaims.claim: Global economic value of Wi-Fi nearly $4.9 trillion in 2025
tamClaims.sentence: The Wi-Fi Alliance has estimated that the global economic value of Wi-Fi, driven in part by efforts to expand coverage in rural and remote areas, effectively helping to bridge the digital divide, is a share of a total value of nearly $4.9 trillion in 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Indoor Wi-Fi AP market $17.2B in 2024, $32.2B in 2032 (8.2% CAGR)
tamClaims.sentence: The total market size for indoor Wi-Fi APs in 2025 is estimated to be on the order of US$17.2 billion in 2024 increasing to US$32.2 billion by 2032 with a CAGR of 8.2%.

tamClaims.claim: Global FWA subscriptions growing 19% YoY to 300M by 2028
tamClaims.sentence: An Ericsson forecast provides that the total global Fixed Wireless Access (FWA) subscriptions will grow at 19 percent year-on-year during the 2022 to 2028 period to reach more than 300 million devices by 2028.

tamClaims.claim: Cybersecurity market in soft-launch country $12.75B in 2023, $23.13B by 2029 (10.27% CAGR)
tamClaims.sentence: The Cybersecurity market in the soft-launch country was valued at US$12.75 billion in 2023, and is expected to reach US$23.13 billion by 2029, rising at a CAGR of 10.27%.

tamClaims.claim: $418 billion needed to connect all unconnected citizens globally
tamClaims.sentence: A study, from November 2023, authored by researchers from George Mason University, University of Oxford and the IMF estimates that out of $418 billion that will be invested to connect all unconnected citizens globally, 73% will be in emerging market economies and 24% in low-income developing countries.
